ideation: This sequence simulates the act of throwing a flying disc.  It begins with both arms drawn back, then moves through the throwing motion, and finally ends with the arms in a relaxed position. The left arm will primarily act as a counterbalance.  The right arm will execute the throw. The robot's lack of an elbow will be addressed by positioning the arm for an overhand throw.

frames.beat: both arms draw back, ready to launch
the right arm whips forward in a powerful throw
arms return to a relaxed, neutral stance
